title: Red Skull
description: While your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue], you have [blue]3[/blue] additional [gold]Strength[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Grants Strength conditionally: the bonus is applied when HP drops to or below 50% and removed when HP rises above 50%. The relic's status updates dynamically during combat to reflect when the Strength bonus is active.
